历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranks for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 1867 → 3958 → 3073 → 1249 → 1226 respectively. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, the rank significantly dropped. Starting from 2024, with the new Gaokao subject selection (Physics + Chemistry), the rank notably moved forward to about 1249, and further slightly increased to 1226 in 2025. In the past two years, it has stabilized in the 1200–1250 range, showing a high-level stabilization trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province: 93 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 95 in 2023, adjusted to 58 after the new Gaokao in 2024, 56 in 2025, and further reduced to 48 in 2026, a decrease of 8 (about -14.3%) compared to 2025. With two consecutive years of enrollment reduction, competition pressure has increased.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 14th (Top 20), with a continuous rise in recent years (19th in 2021 → 14th in 2026). The school level is extremely high, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin incident, etc.), but the school's public opinion response was relatively quick. Douyin popularity ranking 47th (relatively hot), short video exposure is above average, overall application attention has not shown a clear cooling signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above, including Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering as A+, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering as A, Optical Engineering as A. These highly correspond to the enrollment majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology, Electronic Information Experimental Class, Xu Teli Talent Class, Future Precision Engineering Technology, etc.). The discipline strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Classes (Information Science and Technology, Electronic Information Experimental Class, Future Precision Engineering Technology, Excellence Class, etc.) cover popular directions such as artificial intelligence, computer science, robotics, etc., with sustained high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Gaokao is approximately 451,000, a slight decrease from the combined total of about 462,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025. Estimating based on the recent Physics category proportion of about 69%, the number of Physics category candidates in 2026 is about 313,000, a decrease of about 8,000 from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for Anhui candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Anhui is relatively stable, with a plan of 48 in 2026, a small proportion, so the regional preference factor has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining multiple factors: the 2025 baseline rank of 1226, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 14.3% (pushing the rank number smaller), the slight decrease in the total number of Physics category candidates in Anhui (pushing the rank number smaller), the extremely high school level and continuously rising ranking (pushing the rank number smaller), the somewhat negative reputation but limited impact (pushing the rank number slightly larger), and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors (pushing the rank number smaller). Considering the dual effects of the decrease in total candidates and the popularity of hot majors on competition, a slight upward adjustment to 1151 is made. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 1151, with a range of 1011–1291.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Electromechanical).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively easier to enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Smart Vehicle Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted rank approximately 1151, range 1011–1291. Candidates with rank within the lower limit (1011) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Xu Teli Talent Class; candidates with rank near the predicted value (1151) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 Information Science and Technology/Electronic Information Experimental Class, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rank near the upper limit (1291) are advised to mainly target Tier 3 Top-Notch Plan/Smart Manufacturing/Science and Materials, while also considering Tier 2 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1008→957→924→994→763, showing a fluctuating forward trend. In 2025, it significantly moved forward to 763, an increase of about 231 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear rise in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 8 in 2023, significantly increased to 23 after the new Gaokao in 2024, 18 in 2025, and rebounded to 22 in 2026, an increase of 4 (about +22.2%) compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively large, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it ranked 14th (Top 20). Although it is strong in science and engineering, its 985 status still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents, but mainly affecting the science and engineering fields. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 47 (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately high. The History Category enrollment major is the Social Science Experimental Class, which is less affected by negative public opinion in science and engineering. Disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A) have some relevance to the History Category enrollment major (Social Science Experimental Class - Management and Economics direction), but there are relatively few advantageous liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences direction / Management and Economics direction) covers law, economics, business administration, etc., with social popularity stable and slightly hot. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Anhui Province is estimated at about 140,000 based on the recent proportion of about 31%, a slight decrease from 141,000 in 2025, easing competition slightly. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. As a first-tier city, Beijing has strong geographical appeal for liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment scale for History Category in Anhui is small (22 people), so the influence of geographical preference is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 763, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 22.2% (pushing the ranking number higher), a slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates (pushing the ranking number lower), the strong attraction of the university's 985 level (pushing the ranking number lower), and the negative reputation but limited impact (pushing the ranking number slightly higher), and taking into account the bidirectional effects of candidate reduction and enrollment expansion, the ranking is slightly adjusted downward to 845. The predicted minimum ranking is about 845, with a range of 743–947.

- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences direction).

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (743) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Xu Teli Elite Class - International Organizations and Global Governance; candidates with rankings near the predicted value (845) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 Management and Economics direction, while also attempting Tier 1 Humanities and Social Sciences direction; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (947) are advised to use Tier 2 Management and Economics direction as a safety option.
